title: Dendrochilum mindanaense
taxonomy: Dendrochilum mindanaense is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a member of the genus Dendrochilum. The genus Dendrochilum is a part of the subtribe Malaxideae, which is a subgroup of the tribe Malaxideae. This classification helps to organize and understand the relationships among different plant species. By categorizing Dendrochilum mindanaense within the Orchidaceae family, scientists can better study and appreciate its unique characteristics.
